comment.body: We have strong feelings, to say the least. It can come across the wrong way, especially those of us who are less emotionally aware of ourselves. When I travel abroad, I cringe at the phrase 'Thats not how we do it in America'. It pains me and I immediately go apologize on my country's behalf. Most of us aren't like that, but online interactions bring out the freaks. Those people say I'm the freak, but they can't prove it :-)
